target_population: Eligible non-test registered users with a complete seven-day observation window.

estimators.parameter: Population share of eligible users activated within seven days.
estimators.statistic: Unweighted sample proportion of activated_7d among observed respondents.
known_limitations: Inherits coverage and non-response warnings from the sampling audit.

estimators.parameter: Population share of eligible users activated within seven days.
estimators.statistic: Inverse-probability weighted sample proportion of activated_7d among observed respondents.

weights.meaning: Inverse inclusion probability from the sampling frame.

known_limitations: Uses inclusion weights but does not correct non-response.
Effective sample size is approximate and small.

estimators.parameter: Population mean first order amount in RUB across eligible users in the seven-day window.
estimators.statistic: Inverse-probability weighted mean of first_order_amount_rub among observed respondents, including zero amounts.

weights.meaning: Inverse inclusion probability from the sampling frame.

known_limitations: Includes zero revenue as real business mass.
Revenue distribution card flags zero mass and small positive sample.

estimators.parameter: Population median onboarding duration among observed eligible users.
estimators.statistic: Unweighted sample median of onboarding_seconds among observed respondents.
known_limitations: Quantile standard error is deferred to bootstrap.
Distribution card flags a visible right tail.

estimators.parameter: Population support tickets per eligible user in the seven-day window.
estimators.statistic: Inverse-probability weighted count rate per observed user window.

weights.meaning: Inverse inclusion probability from the sampling frame.

known_limitations: Uses a count model diagnostic, not an incident root-cause model.
Small sample makes dispersion diagnostics weak.
